segments.text: In 1912, fragments from a gravel pit
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: in Sussex seemed to give British science
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: the fossil it wanted, a human-like skull,
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: an ape-like jaw, a famous name Piltdown
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Man.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The evidence was thin, but the story
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: was powerful.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: It fit a brain-first theory and gave
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Britain its own ancient ancestor.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Some anatomists doubted the skull and jaw
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: belonged together, but access was limited, prestige
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: was heavy, and the specimen kept circulating
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: as authority.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The fraud was not perfect.
It was welcome.
By 1953, tests exposed the trick.
The skull was recent human bone.
The jaw was from an orangutan.
The teeth had been filed.
The bones had been stained.
The hoax survived because it let the
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: field feel correct.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The mystery fades.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The receipts remain.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay
